question:
[Previous Feedback] Correct! A, C, and E all use the full datetime format with timezone offset.

Please draft the Tuesday progress sync report and save it as day02/progress_report_draft.json. Include these fields: report_date (today), generated_at (current time around 10:30), period_start (this Monday at 09:00), period_end (this Friday at 18:00), summary (a string), and milestones_status (an array).

{
  "report_date": "2026-03-17",

  "summary": "Sprint 7 is underway. API docs v2.3 and the auth bug fix are actively in progress, with the auth fix targeted for Wed EOD and docs targeted for Thu EOD. A third dependency risk remains on missing/changed OAuth provider documentation (token refresh endpoints) with resolution expected by end of week; this may affect downstream integration test completion and the overall readiness of Sprint review materials.",

      "title": "Auth bug fix merged",

    },
    {
      "id": "M-3",

      "status": "pending",

      "last_updated": "2026-03-17T10:00:00+08:00",

    },
    {
      "id": "M-4",
      "title": "Sprint review ready",
      "status": "pending",
      "target_date": "2026-03-20T17:00:00+08:00",
      "last_updated": "2026-03-17T10:00:00+08:00",
      "notes": "Dependent on integration test stability and OAuth documentation clarity; targeting Fri 17:00 readiness."
    }
  ]
}
